name: hud_ui_fill_bitmap_destructor_core
description: HudUiFillBitmap::DestructorCore restores the fill-bitmap table, releases distinct preview/fill images, and chains to HudUiZrdWidget::DestructorCore.
known_limits: The native smoke validates scalar destructor demotion with preview/fill pointers shared with the base image; distinct preview/fill release branches are source-reviewed against Binary Ninja and rely on the accepted zVid_Image::ReleaseIfNotDefault helper.
Binary-safe verification is deferred to a coherent HUD fill-bitmap/ZRD widget pass.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x4b84d0 validates restoring g_HudUiFillBitmap_FTable, releasing previewImage at offset 0x16c when non-null and distinct from base image, releasing fillImage at offset 0x150 under the same condition, clearing released fields, and chaining to HudUiZrdWidget::DestructorCore.
The native smoke validates scalar-deleting destructor demotion through the ZRD/widget base destructor path.
